data.title: Bybit Exchange Hit by Massive $1.4B Hack
data.description:
The massive attack is likely crypto's largest dollar-denominated hack ever.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/bybit-exchange-hit-by-massive-1-4b-hack

data.title: North Korea’s Lazarus Group responsible for ByBit hack resulting in losses of over $1.5 billion: Arkham
data.description:
"ZachXBT submitted definitive proof that this attack on Bybit was performed by the LAZARUS GROUP," Arkham said in a post to X.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/342769/north-koreas-lazarus-group-responsible-for-bybit-hack-resulting-in-losses-of-over-1-5-billion-arkham?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bybit Hack Aftermath: Single Whale Liquidated for $46M as BTC Dumps by $4K
data.description:
The total crypto market cap shed over $150 billion since the incident.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/bybit-hack-aftermath-single-whale-liquidated-for-46m-as-btc-dumps-by-4k/

data.title: Mike Novogratz Explains Why XRP, ADA Still Dominate Crypto Market
data.description:
Cryptocurrency investor Mike Novogratz has provided insights into why XRP and Cardano (ADA) continue to hold strong positions in the market. He emphasized that these digital assets gained early traction, allowing them to build solid communities that sustain their relevance. Despite the rise of new tokens, both XRP and ADA maintain their dominance, with liquidation […]
The post Mike Novogratz...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/21/mike-novogratz-explains-why-xrp-ada-still-dominate-crypto-market/

data.title: European Central Bank Focus on Blockchain Based Payment Layer
data.description:
ECB is already considering a central bank digital currency known as the digital Euro.Blockchain technology could feature heavily.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/news/european-central-bank-focus-on-blockchain-based-payment-layer

data.title: Lawmakers Prepare for Key Crypto Hearings on Capitol Hill
data.description:
The hearings in both chambers of Congress will contemplate CBDCs, stablecoins, and market structure legislation.
source: https://decrypt.co/307288/lawmakers-key-crypto-hearings-capitol-hill

data.title: Bitcoin comes back to life — Does data support a rally to $100K and higher?
data.description:
Bitcoin price staged a recovery this week, but data shows traders reducing their appetite for risk.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-comes-back-to-life-does-data-support-a-rally-to-100k-and-higher?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: North Korea? ZachXBT says an “organization” is behind Bybit’s hack
data.description:
On-chain sleuth ZachXBT has submitted to Arkham Intelligence’s bounty request to uncover Bybit’s hacker. ZachXBT claims an “organization” is possibly behind the $1.4 billion attack today, not a single entity as some had thought.  “My submission has been sent identifying the organization behind the attack using on-chain data,” ZachXBT posted.   Arkham put out a […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-korea-zachxbt-says-an-organization-is-behind-bybits-hack/

data.title: Ethena assures users of solvency after Bybit hack
data.description:
According to Ethena Labs, the USDe stablecoin’s exposure to Bybit via derivatives is more than offset by its reserve fund.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethena-assures-users-solvency-after-bybit-hack?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Japanese Investment Firm Metaplanet’s Bitcoin Holdings Grow To Reach 0.01% of Total BTC Supply
data.description:
Japan’s first and only publicly listed Bitcoin (BTC) treasury company now owns one in every 10,000 of the king coin’s capped supply. In a statement, the Japanese hotel and investment firm Metaplanet says that its Bitcoin holdings have reached 2,100 BTC, or 0.01% of the crypto asset’s maximum total supply of 21 million, following its […]
The post Japanese Investment Firm Metaplanet’s Bitcoin...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/21/japanese-investment-firm-metaplanets-bitcoin-holdings-grow-to-reach-0-01-of-total-btc-supply/
